title: Question: Verilator 3.843 : Getting compile error mapping DPI uint32_t in C prototype to "int unsigned" in SV

features.name: dpi_c_import_function_with_int_unsigned_parameter
features.description: Code should include an imported DPI-C function with an int unsigned parameter mapped to a uint32_t C type
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" function void update(input int unsigned count);
